name: Genshin Stuff (Experimental Version)
description:
An open world which you can explore and talk to various characters. Experimental Version of the Genshin Stuff bot. Feel free to use the character description to create remixes of this bot or to tweak it a little for your own use! Still just a concept, so expect it to be a little unstable. Currently still adding characters, please be patient. Please give feedback so I can make it better, thanks!

WE'RE SO BACK!!! (Sorry about the 5 month hiatus)

Characters missing: All of the Natlan Characters since they've only recently been released 😭

(Things I'm planning to add in order: Missing characters, factions, world context/lore)


Also, since many people have been having a problem on getting the previous bot to work, I've added a guide. (Changes from original bot: Uses a new characteristics/character description format, May not work well, idk) (Link for the guide: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1JE7NGB6E_0GVoy4NSjL1m RNNZxlz6DoiGMFbAmWZ3vk/edit?usp=sharing) THIS BOT WILL NOT WORK WITH JANITOR's LLM, PLEASE REFER TO THE GUIDE ON THE GOOGLE DOCS LINK.
creator: FriedRice
